text_block_list.text: (Beep, beep, beep… Beep…)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Starting today, my life as a Tracen Academy 
student finally begins!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! If it's okay with you, Suzuka, 
do you want to go to school toge—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: She's already gone?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Her tracksuit's not here, so maybe she went for an 
early morning run? Wow, she really wakes up early…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wonder if she'd let me run with her again if I asked.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maybe when she gets back, I'll work up the courage to ask. 
Then afterwards… Hee hee!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah! I gotta get going! If I keep daydreaming, I'm gonna be late!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Bueno!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, greetings, and salutations! I've been waiting 
for our bold new challenger to step into the ring! 
Bienvenida, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh, ah, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh… Do excuse her for startling you. 
I'll be sure to give her a stern talking to afterwards.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: My lecture senses are tingling!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm Grass Wonder, and this is El Condor Pasa. 
It's a pleasure to meet you, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yeah, nice to meet you too! So… is it okay 
if I call you Grass and El then?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
¡Sí! Oh, and if you feel like it, I wouldn't mind you taggin' 
"the world's strongest racer" to my name either!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ¡Anda! Class is about to start! ¡Chau, Spe! See ya later!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-Yeah, see you…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Did I just make some friends? Yeees! 
I should keep this up for class and training too!)

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
All right, then, Special Week, please answer number five… 
Special Week? Hey, are you listening?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-Yes?! S-Sorry, I was copying notes from the board!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(So fast! Back home, the teacher always met my pace 
since I was the only student. I didn't think classes in the 
big city'd be goin' a mile a minute!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is bad, bad, bad, Spe! There's gonna be 
a quiz in math class next!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! A quiz?! Wh-wh-what should I do? 
I'm not ready at all!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's times like these where one must remain calm, Spe. 
The contents of the test will all be fundamentals, 
so you'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Grass… Oh, thank you so much! 
That's right, I should be okay with the basics…!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Or at least that's what I'd say if I knew the basics!!)

text_block_list.name: Teacher B
text_block_list.text:
Special Week… Now, I know you're our new transfer, but this 
score is… I think I'll have to assign you some extra work.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sooooorry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't think too much about it, Spe. It's still your first day, 
it's normal not to have a solid grip on things yet.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's right! There's no use in feeling down! 
In any case, this afternoon is…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The highly anticipated! The long-awaited! The moment we've 
all been waiting for… Practice tiiiiime! We'll be training our 
racing skills!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Training! Yeah… You're totally right! So what if class went bad?
Surely training will go much better!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my. It seems Spe will be in this group for the scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No way! Now I'm feelin' extra pumped! I heard her results 
in the entrance exam were super amazing!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'm also looking forward to it. I wonder what 
kind of running style she has.
(Ka-thunk!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff… puff… Huff… puff…!!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, she's a little behind the middle. 
Think that makes her a betweener?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: She seems somewhat… stiff.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(There are four furlongs to go! I'd better kick it 
into high gear here!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Haaah…! Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Wh-what?! No way, why are my legs so heavy?! 
I-I shouldn't be tired yet!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Guess she ran out of gas…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hm… She's likely not used to this track… Then there are 
also nerves to consider… Those combined might already 
have her drained.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm… So that's why her running feels off. Qué pena…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh… First class and now training too? Everything's gone so horribly…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, Spe. Remember, it's still your first day. 
I think it's best if you take your time getting used to everything.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Graaaaass! You still haven't changed yet?! Don't tell me 
you've forgotten your promise, your sworn oath!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Calm down. If it's our partner running you're referring to, 
then, no, I haven't. You'll have to excuse us, Spe. 
We'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh… Y-Yes, see you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Both of them are so amazing. Classes during the morning and 
training in the afternoon. Then more training after all that…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I wonder if I'll be able to keep up… Mom…)
